problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) may resolve What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
